title: T-009 — Implement SET-005 First Product step (soft redirect to 03-TECHNICAL, skippable)
prompt:
Implement step 4 screen: soft redirect to 03-TECHNICAL create product, with skip button.

PRD §14.3-14.4 SET-005: 
- Optional step (can skip via 'Skip Creating a Product' button)
- Shows intro text: "Create your first product"
- "Proceed to Product Module" button links to /technical/products (or main create product flow)
- "Skip" button marks step 4 as skipped and moves to step 5
- Supports resume: if user navigates back, same state is recovered

Acceptance:
- Step 4 screen renders with both button options
- 'Proceed' button navigates to product creation (soft redirect)
- 'Skip' button calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step {step_number: 4, skip: true} and advances to step 5
- onboarding_state.skipped_steps includes 4 after skip is clicked

Test: E2E test verifies skip button marks step 4 as skipped and updates state correctly.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 4 soft redirect to product creation (skippable)
pipeline_inputs.details: Create FirstProductStep component (no form, just UI). Display: title 'Create Your First Product', description text, two buttons: (1) 'Proceed to Product Module' (href to /technical/products or /app/technical/products). (2) 'Skip Creating a Product' (calls POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=4, skip=true). Backend should add 4 to skipped_steps and set current_step=5. After skip, navigate to step 5 (SET-006). This is a 'soft redirect' screen — user can proceed to product creation or skip. Match wizard design language.
acceptance_criteria: Given step 4 screen is rendered, when user clicks 'Proceed to Product Module', then user navigates to /technical/products (soft redirect)
Given step 4 screen is rendered, when user clicks 'Skip', then POST /api/v1/onboarding/step with step_number=4, skip=true is called
Given skip button clicked, when response returns current_step=5, then step 4 appears in skipped_steps array
test_strategy: Write e2e test: test_product_step_skip() clicks skip button and verifies skipped_steps contains 4
Write e2e test: test_product_step_redirect() clicks proceed button and verifies href navigation
Verify GET /api/v1/onboarding/resume shows skipped_steps: [4] after skip
risk_red_lines: Do not auto-skip this step; only skip on explicit user action
Do not block wizard progression if user skips product creation
